steps.t: The Tyrant Barashish is at Tirith Rhaw, north of Glân Vraig, in the centre of the Coldfells. Sergeant-at-Arms Hesten at Glân Vraig directed you to see…
Sergeant-at-Arms Hesten awaits your return at Glân Vraig. You defeated the Tyrant Barashish to reclaim Tirith Rhaw, You should return to Sergeant-at-A…
